description: Temporal evaluation dataset for [workspace] service contracts

documentation.reference_date: Date used to filter versioned entities. Format: YYYY-MM-DD
documentation.expected_version: Expected sequence_index of the correct entity version (optional)
documentation.metadata.entity_type: Type of entity being queried (e.g., service_rate, pricing)

test_cases.question: What is the price per event for Boeing 787 TURN service?
test_cases.ground_truth: The Boeing 787 TURN service price is $227.24 per event.

test_cases.question: What is the price per event for Boeing 787 RON service?
test_cases.ground_truth: The Boeing 787 RON (Remain Overnight) service price is $391.93 per event.
